message:
feat(conformance): add 28 tests for DBSIZE, RANDOMKEY, OBJECT, COMMAND, DEBUG

Expand core_connection coverage from 106 to 134 cases:
- DBSIZE: verifies count across all data types (string, hash, list, set, zset)
  and count after DEL
- RANDOMKEY: deterministic test with single key in store
- OBJECT HELP/ENCODING/REFCOUNT/IDLETIME/FREQ: full subcommand coverage
  including int vs embstr encoding, nonexistent key error, unknown subcommand
- COMMAND COUNT: uses any_integer wildcard for dynamic count
- COMMAND DOCS: unknown command returns empty array
- DEBUG: SET-ACTIVE-EXPIRE, SLEEP 0, JMAP, RELOAD subcommands

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1522,9 +1522,382 @@
         "value": 0

     },

+    {

+    },
+    {

+      }
+    },
